title: Transformation of Chemically Competent Cells
steps: Add 1 µL of miniprep plasmid or 5 µL of Gibson product into competent cell Hi-Fi Gibson Assembly by NUS iGEM
Incubate cells in 42 °C water bath for 00:00:45
Add 1 mL of LB media into cell sample Preparation of LB Media by NUS iGEM
Spin down the cells at 6000 x g for 00:01:00
Transfer 100 µL of the culture onto the agar plate containing appropriate antibiotic Preparation of LB Agar by NUS iGEM
creator: NUS iGEM
